home.heroSubtitle: Beautiful, culturally rich printed cards for your most auspicious moments. Choose a design, customize in minutes, and we deliver to your doorstep.
home.categoriesSubtitle: From grand weddings to intimate pujas, we have traditional and modern themes for your event.
home.workflowSubtitle: We've made ordering high-quality, beautifully crafted invitations incredibly simple for your entire family.
home.step1Desc: Select from hundreds of curated Indian designs ranging from Royal Rajasthani to Minimalist Modern.
home.step2Desc: Type your details in English or Hindi. See real-time changes directly on the card.
home.step3Desc: Check exactly how the printed card will look, with accurate colors and authentic fonts.
home.step4Desc: Premium quality printing, carefully packaged and delivered rapidly to your home.
home.mockupText: Invite you to share their joy as they tie the knot

cards.pageSubtitle: Discover deeply rooted, culturally rich designs tailored for your unforgettable moments.
cards.emptyState: We couldn't find any designs in this collection currently.

cardDetail.defaultDescription: A beautifully crafted invitation to turn your special moments into lifelong memories. Customize wording, fonts, and layouts to perfect your personal touch.
cardDetail.selectColorHint: You will select your preferred color during checkout.
cardDetail.ctaHint: You can review the design, select print color, and enter delivery details in the next step.

checkout.title: Complete Your Order
checkout.phoneDetailsMsg: You have chosen to provide printing details over a phone call or WhatsApp. Our team will contact you shortly after you place the order!
checkout.formUnderConstruction: Detailed online forms for specific events are currently under construction. Please check the box above to provide your details via phone call or WhatsApp after placing the order.
checkout.noFormAvailable: No specific form available for this category yet. Please provide details securely over WhatsApp/Phone call.
checkout.detailsByPhone: Details to be provided via phone call or WhatsApp.
checkout.paymentVerifyFailed: Payment verification failed. Please contact support.

orders.noOrdersDesc: You haven't placed any invitation orders.

footer.tagline: Connecting families with beautiful, culturally rich invitation cards. Designed with love, printed with precision.
footer.followUs: Follow us on social media for design inspiration.
